name: toggle-group
description: A set of toggles with single (radiogroup) or multiple (group + aria-pressed) selection; roving-tabindex arrow-key nav per Radix.
docs: Register <lv-toggle-group> by importing components/ui/toggle-group.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as { value, label?, icon?, disabled? }[], set `type` (single|multiple) and bind `value` (string for single, string[] for multiple). Listen for `lv-change` (detail = new value). `variant`, `size` cascade to every item; set `aria-label` for an icon-only group.
